name: Skewered Shrimp and Cherry Tomatoes
recipeIngredient: 3/4 pound jumbo shrimp, peeled and deveined
recipeInstructions:
Chili Mopping Sauce: Combine all ingredients in a small glass bowl. Stir the sauce before using.
Shrimp: Thread the shrimp onto the skewers, alternating with orange slices and cherry tomatoes, and ending with shrimp on one skewer. Place the skewers on a grill rack coated with non-stick cooking spray. Grill over medium coals until the shrimp are white in color and just firm to touch, turning once and mopping with additional sauce for about 2 minutes total. Do not overgrill or the shrimp will become tough. Serve one kabob per plate, passing remaining sauce on the side.
Cals: 127
% CFF: 7%
Fat: 1 gm
